mdtools.failure_summary: The mdtools run reached the 30-turn cap with zero mutations. The final scored output was effectively the original source: `### User Feedback Collection` remained under `## Post-Launch Monitoring` instead of moving under `## Beta Testing`.

hybrid.failure_summary: The hybrid run made eight mutations but still reached the 30-turn cap with the final scored output preserving the source-side `### User Feedback Collection` placement rather than the expected destination-only move.

unix.failure_summary: The unix run reached the 30-turn cap after one tool call, produced zero mutations, and left the original heading order intact.

gap.rejection_reason: All three modes failed under both scorers, so the candidate produced no hybrid-minus-unix pass-rate gap and is not eligible for promotion.

notes: This product-launch feedback relocation was realistic, but it exceeded the target model's reliable execution in all modes.
The trace adds rejected-candidate evidence only; no fixed-anchor or current-corpus HEADLINE row is warranted because no corpus member was promoted and no gap moved.
